headline: Rösti softens CO2 penalty regime for car importers, sparing ~100M francs
summary: Federal Council relaxes Switzerland's 93.6 g/km new-car CO2 target to multi-year averaging over 2025-2027, waiving ~100M francs in importer sanctions.

headline: Both Beznau reactors taken offline as heatwave warms the Aare beyond cooling limits
summary: Switzerland's oldest nuclear plant shut down because the Aare river is too warm to cool the reactors during the heatwave.

headline: Meta expands its Zurich AI footprint, chasing the city's research talent
summary: Meta is growing its Zurich AI presence, drawn by local research talent; built around ex-OpenAI Zurich researchers.

headline: Vaud Council of State election: UDC's Thuillard runs again, Dittli's plans unclear
summary: Vaud cantonal executive contest: UDC incumbent Jean-Francois Thuillard stands for re-election; Valerie Dittli's intentions unresolved.

headline: Powerful earthquakes devastate Venezuela; toll rising and contested
summary: Two quakes Wednesday 2026-06-24 (first magnitude 7.2 west of Caracas) killed 235-500+; international and Swiss rescue teams deployed.

headline: Hezbollah demands unconditional Israeli withdrawal as US-mediated talks extend; Trump alleges Iran ceasefire breach
summary: Hezbollah chief Qassem demands full Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon as US-brokered talks are extended; Trump accuses Iran of ceasefire violation.

headline: John Bolton pleads guilty to unlawfully retaining classified information
summary: Ex-Trump national security adviser pleaded guilty in a Maryland federal court to retaining classified material shared with relatives for a book.

headline: Ukraine escalates deep-strike campaign against Russian logistics, isolating Crimea
summary: Kyiv intensifies strikes on oil, power, convoys and bridges in occupied Crimea and near Moscow; Russia relocates air defences.

headline: South Korea jails former first lady Kim Keon Hee for seven years for bribery
summary: Seoul court convicts wife of ex-president Yoon Suk Yeol of accepting luxury bribes for political favours; she will appeal.

headline: CISA adds Cisco Unified CM SSRF (CVE-2026-20230) to KEV
summary: Unauthenticated SSRF in Cisco Unified Communications Manager added to CISA KEV 2026-06-25, file-write to OS escalable to root; due 2026-06-28.

headline: GeoVision GV-LPC license-plate cameras: cluster of unauthenticated CVSS 9.8 RCEs
summary: Multiple unauthenticated 9.8 stack buffer overflows (CVE-2026-57878/79/80/81) plus related bugs in GeoVision GV-LPC2011/2211 EOL cameras.

headline: Node.js TLS wildcard hostname-verification bypass (CVE-2026-48618)
summary: Unicode dot normalization mismatch lets a wildcard cert authenticate unintended hostnames; affects Node.js 22, 24, 26.

headline: KubeVirt cross-tenant VM takeover when live-migration TLS disabled (CVE-2026-13325)
summary: disableTLS opens an unauthenticated 0.0.0.0 listener proxying into virtqemud, letting any pod control another tenant's VM.

headline: Canonical LXD guest can mount and overwrite another guest's storage volume (CVE-2026-12411)
summary: Broken access control in LXD devLXD patch handler lets an untrusted guest access another guest's custom storage volume.

headline: Insecure deserialization in OWASP ZAP ViewState add-on (CVE-2026-57527)
summary: A malicious proxied server can achieve RCE in ZAP's JVM via a crafted javax.faces.ViewState Java object; fixed in add-on v4.

headline: arXiv 2606.27288 — co-failure ceiling on routing/voting/mixture-of-agents
summary: Proves multi-model LLM accuracy is capped by the all-models-wrong rate beta, not recoverable from pairwise error correlation; 67 models.

headline: arXiv 2606.27326 — hallucination in generative world models is predictable and preventable
summary: World-model hallucination concentrates in low-coverage state-action regions; introduces MMBench2 and three failure modes.

headline: arXiv 2606.27229 — CARVE: key-axis-only gating for chunk-parallel linear attention
summary: Erasing only on the key axis fixes three defects in delta-rule recurrent models and restores the chunk-parallel WY solver.

headline: arXiv 2606.27369 — RiVER: RL for LLMs without ground-truth answers
summary: Verifiable RL using continuous execution-feedback rewards; tackles scale dominance and frequency dominance.

headline: arXiv 2606.27199 — steering LLM forecasters away from look-ahead bias
summary: Uses SAEs to find time-awareness vs look-ahead-bias features and steers forecasters to reduce leakage of future knowledge.

headline: arXiv 2606.27359 — when sequence probability tracks correctness in LLMs
summary: Quantifies where higher-likelihood decodings align with correctness across methods, hyperparameters, and repeated samples.
